title: Opening for Real Estate Agent at Godrej Properties Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Opening for Real Estate Agent at Godrej Properties Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Properties Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Real Estate Agent to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Properties Advisory Limited:
Godrej Properties Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
